query: I want to cancel an order

input.message: I want to cancel an order.

flow.step1: figure out hook to get user data and trigger it and remember the response
flow.step2: figure out hook to get all orders data for a user, or if no related hook is found, just ask the user for the order id, trigger the hook and remember the response
flow.step3: Tell user which order would he like to cancel from the orders data you got!

output.message: Which order would you like to cancel from these?

input.message: I would like to cancel order with id 101

flow.step: Ask user why he/she wants to cancel that order.

output.message: Why do you want to cancel this order ?

input.message: I want to cancel it because the price has reduced now.

flow.step1: figure out the hook to get order data with that order id, trigger the hook and remember the response.
flow.step2: check if the order is eligible for cancellation by analyzing the data.
flow.step3: if the order is eligible for cancellation, then figure out the order cancellation hook and trigger the hook with the needed data.
flow.step4: Tell the user about if order was cancelled or if it can't be cancelled.

if (condition).message: Your order with order id 101 has been cancelled

else.message: Sorry your order is not eligible for cancellation, I am sorry.

query: I want to return an order

input.message: I want to return an order

flow.step1: figure out hook to get user data and trigger it and remember the response
flow.step2: figure out hook to get all order details or if no related hook is found, just ask the user for the order id, and remember the response
flow.step3: Ask the user which order they want to return from those orders

output.message: Which order do you want to return ?

flow.step1: figure out hook to get order data and trigger it and remember the response
flow.step2: Check if order is eligible for return!
flow.step3: If order is not eligible then just tell the user, otherwise if it is eligible then tell the user why they want to return it.

output.message: Why do you want to return this order ?

input.message: When I got it, I saw that it was damaged!

flow.step1: Verify whether the user is truthful and right!
flow.step2: Ask user to provide the image of the damage.

output.message: Ok, to verify, I need the image of that damaged order.

flow.step1: Send the image to AI for analyis and record the response.
flow.step2: If the user is proved right, then return the order, otherwise just let the user know verification failed!

output.message: The return request has been successfully intiated.
